---
title: "D 23-50400-1 L07"
author: "Niloy Paul"
date: "2026-04-21"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(readr)


library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)

data <- iris
head(data)

summary(data)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Sepal.Length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal()
  
  pairs(data[,1:4], main = "Pair Plot of Features")
  
  num_data <- data %>% select_if(is.numeric)
cor(num_data)

# Check missing values
colSums(is.na(data))

# Scaling numeric features
# Important for many ML models (though trees don't require it)
num_cols <- data %>% select_if(is.numeric)

scaled_features <- scale(num_cols)

# Replace original numeric columns with scaled values
data_scaled <- data
data_scaled[, names(num_cols)] <- scaled_features

# Check structure
str(data_scaled)

# Regression split
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(data_scaled$Sepal.Length, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

train_data <- data_scaled[trainIndex, ]
test_data  <- data_scaled[-trainIndex, ]

lm_model <- lm(Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width + Petal.Length + Petal.Width, data = train_data)
summary(lm_model)

pred_lm <- predict(lm_model, newdata = test_data)
rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$Sepal.Length - pred_lm)^2))
rmse

plot(test_data$Sepal.Length, pred_lm,
     xlab = "Actual",
     ylab = "Predicted",
     main = "Actual vs Predicted")
abline(0, 1, col = "red")

# Classification split (use original data, scaling not required)
trainIndex2 <- createDataPartition(data$Species, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

train_cls <- data[trainIndex2, ]
test_cls  <- data[-trainIndex2, ]

dt_model <- rpart(Species ~ ., data = train_cls, method = "class")
rpart.plot(dt_model)

dt_model$variable.importance

pred_dt <- predict(dt_model, test_cls, type = "class")
confusionMatrix(pred_dt, test_cls$Species)

#Exercise based on own dataset

file_id <- "1QBkrF-waQtZdRKXCQbuCnYsythc-2ggS"

drive_url <- paste0(
  "https://drive.google.com/uc?id=",
  file_id,
  "&export=download"
)

dataset <- read_csv(drive_url, show_col_types = FALSE)

#Basic EDA
head(dataset)
summary(dataset)
str(dataset)

#Convert Categorical Variables
dataset$sex <- as.factor(dataset$sex)
dataset$smoker <- as.factor(dataset$smoker)
dataset$region <- as.factor(dataset$region)

#Distribution Plot
ggplot(dataset, aes(x = charges)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal()
  
#Pair plot (numeric only)
num_data <- dataset %>% select_if(is.numeric)
pairs(num_data, main = "Pair Plot of Numeric Features")

# Correlation
cor(num_data)

# Missing values
colSums(is.na(dataset))

# Train-test split
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(dataset$charges, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

train_data <- dataset[trainIndex, ]
test_data  <- dataset[-trainIndex, ]

# Linear regression model
lm_model <- lm(charges ~ age + bmi + children + sex + smoker + region,
               data = train_data)

summary(lm_model)

# Prediction
pred_lm <- predict(lm_model, newdata = test_data)

# RMSE
rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_data$charges - pred_lm)^2))
rmse

# Plot
plot(test_data$charges, pred_lm,
     xlab = "Actual",
     ylab = "Predicted",
     main = "Actual vs Predicted")

abline(0, 1, col = "red")


# Create classification target
dataset$charge_level <- ifelse(dataset$charges > median(dataset$charges), "High", "Low")
dataset$charge_level <- as.factor(dataset$charge_level)

# Train-test split
trainIndex2 <- createDataPartition(dataset$charge_level, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

train_cls <- dataset[trainIndex2, ]
test_cls  <- dataset[-trainIndex2, ]

# Decision Tree
dt_model <- rpart(charge_level ~ age + bmi + children + sex + smoker + region,
                  data = train_cls,
                  method = "class")

# Plot tree
rpart.plot(dt_model)

# Feature importance
dt_model$variable.importance

# Prediction
pred_dt <- predict(dt_model, test_cls, type = "class")

# Confusion matrix
confusionMatrix(pred_dt, test_cls$charge_level)
